page.title: Talk:Funerary practices of the Yayoi period

revision.comment: Bot: created missing page [[Talk:Funerary practices of the Yayoi period]] redirect to enwiki [[Talk:Funerary practices of the Yayoi period]]
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Talk:Funerary practices of the Yayoi period]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia redirects
Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:弥生時代の墓制); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:31, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/24420999 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:31, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:弥生時代の墓制 | revid=24420999 --> == 分割提案 ==
四隅突出型憤丘墓が、一つの項目として充分成り立つ分量・内容にまで成長したと思いますので、分割を提案します。--[[利用者:Godaigo|Godaigo]] 2009年2月9日 (月) 06:38 (UTC)
私も賛成です。--[[利用者:Piasu9|Piasu9]] 2009年2月16日 (月) 06:24 (UTC)
1週間経過しましたが、反対する人がおられませんでしたので、分割しました。--[[利用者:Godaigo|Godaigo]] 2009年2月16日 (月) 06:30 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:31, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:31, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/24420999 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:31, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:弥生時代の墓制 | revid=24420999 --> == 分割提案 ==
四隅突出型憤丘墓が、一つの項目として充分成り立つ分量・内容にまで成長したと思いますので、分割を提案します。--[[User:Godaigo|Godaigo]] 2009年2月9日 (月) 06:38 (UTC)
私も賛成です。--[[User:Piasu9|Piasu9]] 2009年2月16日 (月) 06:24 (UTC)
1週間経過しましたが、反対する人がおられませんでしたので、分割しました。--[[User:Godaigo|Godaigo]] 2009年2月16日 (月) 06:30 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:31, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Funerary_practices_of_the_Yayoi_period here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Funerary_practices_of_the_Yayoi_period for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:31, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/24420999 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:31, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:弥生時代の墓制 | revid=24420999 --> == 分割提案 ==
四隅突出型憤丘墓が、一つの項目として充分成り立つ分量・内容にまで成長したと思いますので、分割を提案します。--[[User:Godaigo|Godaigo]] 2009年2月9日 (月) 06:38 (UTC)
私も賛成です。--[[User:Piasu9|Piasu9]] 2009年2月16日 (月) 06:24 (UTC)
1週間経過しましたが、反対する人がおられませんでしたので、分割しました。--[[User:Godaigo|Godaigo]] 2009年2月16日 (月) 06:30 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:31, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
